report: CrowLoki Repos vs Van Nueman — Feature Gap Analysis

todo_features.feature: Adaptive Vector Compression (WHT + quantization + bit packing)
todo_features.description: 6-10x compression for AI memory embeddings using Walsh-Hadamard Transform decorrelation, adaptive outlier detection, uniform quantization, and bit packing. Profiles: CrowStation (3-bit/10x), Universal (4-bit/8x), Aggressive (2-bit/16x), HighFidelity (8-bit/4x).
todo_features.notes: Van Nueman has WHT audio but no memory vector compression. crowquant's WHT-based approach directly complements the existing WHT infrastructure.

todo_features.description: Compressed-domain cosine similarity and K-nearest-neighbor search on quantized vectors without full decompression.
todo_features.notes: Would enable efficient agent memory retrieval at scale.

todo_features.description: Bridges to store/search compressed vectors in SQLite-vec, LanceDB (vector DB), and Honcho (dialectic memory system).
Self-maintaining runtime subsystem that monitors and heals its own state. First-class subsystem with status/sample CLI commands.
todo_features.notes: Directly aligns with Van Nueman's autopoietic pillar philosophy. Would formalize self-healing agent behavior.

todo_features.description: Unified CLI with feature flags (crowquant.enabled, autopoiesis.enabled), diagnostics subsystem that explains unavailable features, local-first config at ~/.crowclaw/.
Standalone village-style multi-agent social simulation where agents interact, form relationships, and evolve in a simulated environment.
todo_features.notes: Van Nueman has CrowNest already but lacks the OASIS village simulation engine.

todo_features.description: Graph-backed swarm prediction web app with Vue.js frontend and Flask backend. Document-to-graph-to-simulation workflow. Prediction Lab for live topic/news/price forecasting via multi-agent debate.
Configuration layer supporting Ollama, OpenRouter, OpenAI, Anthropic, and generic OpenAI-compatible endpoints without code changes.
todo_features.notes: Van Nueman LLM bridge is Ollama-only currently.

todo_features.description: Agent autonomously creates skills from experience, improves them during use, persists knowledge across sessions, and builds a deepening user model. FTS5 session search.
todo_features.notes: Most impactful feature for evolving agent intelligence. Aligns with PCMSRM growth philosophy.

todo_features.description: Single gateway supporting Telegram, Discord, Slack, WhatsApp, Signal, and CLI. Agents communicate through any channel transparently.
Built-in scheduler for periodic agent tasks with delivery to any supported platform (Telegram, Discord, etc.).
Multiple execution environments for agent code: local process, Docker container, SSH remote, Singularity container, Modal serverless, Daytona workspace, Vercel Sandbox.
todo_features.notes: Useful for sandboxed code execution. Van Nueman has no agent code execution backend.

todo_features.description: Standard protocol for tool discovery and invocation. 40+ tools with toolset system.
Batch trajectory generation and reinforcement learning environments for agent training.
todo_features.notes: Van Nueman has neuroevolution but no dedicated RL training framework for agents.

todo_features.description: Dual-recurrent module: high-level (slow, abstract planning) + low-level (rapid, detailed computations). 27M parameters. Near-perfect on Sudoku/mazes with only 1000 samples. Outperforms larger models on ARC.
todo_features.notes: Directly relevant to Van Nueman's agent cognition. Could replace/supplement existing cognition.cpp.

todo_features.description: Memory-efficient attention mechanism for transformer-like architectures.
Three-layer architecture: raw/ (immutable sources) → wiki/ (LLM-generated pages) → CLAUDE.md (schema). Ingest/Query/Lint operations. Cross-linked wiki maintained by LLM.
todo_features.notes: Could serve as Van Nueman's documentation pipeline.

todo_features.description: MCP server compatible knowledge base. Obsidian vault integration. Spaced repetition flashcards, Mermaid diagrams, Dataview dashboard.
Secure agent execution with Landlock FS restrictions, seccomp syscall filtering, and network namespace isolation. Capability drops, process limits.
todo_features.notes: Critical for safely running untrusted agent code. Van Nueman has no sandboxing.

todo_features.description: Baseline network rules, operator approval for egress, egress control policies for agents.
117+ NVIDIA-verified portable skill instruction sets (SKILL.md format). Open Agent Skills spec. Skills for CUDA-Q, cuOpt, Megatron, NeMo, TensorRT-LLM.
todo_features.notes: Standard format for agent capability discovery.
